createAccountDescription: Generate a new account to get started. Your keys, your messages.
importAccountDescription: Already have an account? Import your existing account to continue.
tapToSignIn: Tap an account to sign back in.
createAccountHelp: Generate a new account with a unique key pair. This becomes your identity on the Umbra network.
recoveryPhraseHelp: You'll receive a 12-word recovery phrase. Write it down and keep it safe — it's the only way to restore your identity.
keysNeverLeaveDevice: Your keys never leave your device
noEmailRequired: No email or phone number required
importAccountHelp: Restore your identity using a previously saved recovery phrase (12 or 24 words).
importRecoveryHelp: This recovers your exact DID, keys, and identity — your friends will recognize you automatically.
useSameRecoveryPhrase: Use the same recovery phrase from account creation
enterPinToSignIn: Enter your PIN to sign in
tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again in {{seconds}}s.
createPinDescription:
Create a 5-digit PIN to lock the app and protect your keys.
You'll need this PIN each time you open the app.
pinsDoNotMatch: PINs do not match. Please try again.
